allow: Bash(cd ../../ && ls -d */ | while read d; do du -sh "$d" 2>/dev/null; done)

Bash(cd ../../ && powershell -Command "Get-ChildItem -Directory | ForEach-Object { $size = \(Get-ChildItem $_.FullName -Recurse -File -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Measure-Object -Property Length -Sum\).Sum; '{0:N0} MB  {1}' -f \($size/1MB\), $_.Name }")
